about.description: This is a communications platform that enables you to build connections through text and video features

selection.title: Features
selection.description: FuelCommunication provides the possibility of text and video communication

features.1: The highly loaded parts of the application are written in Rust-lang
features.2: The entire source code of the application is publicly available

login.title: Login to FuelCommunication
login.description: Enter your credentials to access your account
login.backButtonLabel: Don't have an account? Sign up!

register.title: Register on FuelCommunication
register.description: Enter your credentials to create account
register.backButtonLabel: Already have an account? Sign in
